member.name: T:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Buttons.ButtonStyle
member.summary: Defines the visual style variants available for button components.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Buttons.ButtonStyle.Default
member.summary: The standard button style.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Buttons.ButtonStyle.Slim
member.summary: A compact, reduced-padding button style.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Buttons.CornerButton
member.summary: A Blazor component that renders a small button intended for corner placement within a panel or container.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Buttons.CornerButton.Class
member.summary: Additional CSS class names to apply to the button element.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Buttons.CornerButton.OnClick
member.summary: Callback invoked when the button is clicked.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Buttons.CornerButton.ChildContent
member.summary: The content rendered inside the button.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Buttons.IconButton
member.summary: A Blazor component that renders a button or anchor element with an SVG icon and optional label text.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Buttons.IconButton.Icon
member.summary: The SVG icon to display inside the button.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Buttons.IconButton.Text
member.summary: Optional label text rendered next to the icon.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Buttons.IconButton.OnClick
member.summary: Callback invoked when the button is clicked.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Buttons.IconButton.Title
member.summary: The tooltip text shown on hover.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Buttons.IconButton.Class
member.summary: Additional CSS class names to apply to the button or anchor element.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Buttons.IconButton.Href
member.summary: When set, renders the component as an anchor element navigating to this URL.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Buttons.IconButton.Target
member.summary: The anchor target attribute used when is set.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Buttons.IconButton.FlagStyle
member.summary: Whether the "active" CSS class is applied when is true.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Buttons.IconButton.Active
member.summary: Whether the button is in an active (pressed) state.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Buttons.ResetButton
member.summary: A Blazor component that renders a reset icon button for clearing control values.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Buttons.ResetButton.OnClick
member.summary: Callback invoked when the reset button is clicked.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Buttons.ResetButton.Class
member.summary: Additional CSS class names to apply to the button.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Buttons.SquareButton
member.summary: A Blazor component that renders a square-shaped button with configurable text and style.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Buttons.SquareButton.ChildContent
member.summary: The content to be rendered inside the button, such as text or icons.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Buttons.SquareButton.OnClick
member.summary: Callback invoked when the button is clicked.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Buttons.SquareButton.ButtonStyle
member.summary: The visual style variant applied to the button.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Buttons.SquareButton.Href
member.summary: When set, renders the component as an anchor element navigating to this URL.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Buttons.SquareButton.Target
member.summary: The anchor target attribute used when is set.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Buttons.ToggleButton
member.summary: A Blazor component that renders a toggle button displaying "False" / "True" states backed by a boolean value.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Buttons.ToggleButton.Value
member.summary: The current boolean state of the toggle.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Buttons.ToggleButton.OnChange
member.summary: Callback invoked when the toggle state changes.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Buttons.BasicButton.ChildContent
member.summary: The content to be rendered inside the button, such as text or icons.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Buttons.BasicButton.OnClick
member.summary: Callback invoked when the button is clicked.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Buttons.BasicButton.Title
member.summary: The tooltip text shown on hover.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Buttons.BasicButton.Class
member.summary: Additional CSS class names to apply to the button or anchor element.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Buttons.BasicButton.Href
member.summary: When set, renders the component as an anchor element navigating to this URL.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Buttons.BasicButton.Target
member.summary: The anchor target attribute used when is set.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Extensions.ExtensionMethods
member.summary: General-purpose extension methods for common collection and type operations.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Extensions.ExtensionMethods.ForEach``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.Action{``0})
member.summary: Executes an action for each element in the sequence.
member.param: The sequence to iterate.
The action to invoke on each element.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Extensions.ExtensionMethods.Select``1(System.Array,System.Func{System.Object,``0})
member.summary: Projects each element of a non-generic into a new form.
member.param: The array to project.
A transform function applied to each element.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Extensions.ExtensionMethods.Exclude(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.String[])
member.summary: Returns a new dictionary that contains all the elements of the original dictionary except the ones with the specified keys.
member.param: A dictionary to exclude the specified keys.
Key strings to exclude from the dictionary.
member.returns: A dictionary that contains all the elements of the original dictionary except the ones with the specified keys.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Extensions.ExtensionMethods.IsGenericTypeOf(System.Type,System.Type)
member.summary: Returns the type is a generic type of the specified type.
member.param: A type object to compare with the specified generics type.
A generics type to compare with the specified type.
member.returns: Returns true if the specified type is the specified generics type. otherwise, false.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Extensions.ValueTaskExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for .

member.name: M:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Extensions.ValueTaskExtensions.AndLogException(System.Threading.Tasks.ValueTask,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Registers a continuation on the that logs any exception to the given logger if the task faults.
member.param: The task to observe.
The logger to write the error to.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Icons.Badge
member.summary: A Blazor component that renders a small badge label, displayed only when Text is non-empty.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Icons.Badge.Text
member.summary: The text to display inside the badge.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Icons.SvgIcon
member.summary: A Blazor component that renders an SVG icon by referencing a symbol defined in .

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Icons.SvgIcon.Type
member.summary: The icon type that determines which SVG symbol to render.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Icons.SvgIcon.Class
member.summary: Additional CSS class names to apply to the SVG element.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Icons.SvgIcon.OnClick
member.summary: Callback invoked when the icon is clicked.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Icons.SvgIcons
member.summary: A Blazor component that embeds all SVG symbol definitions used by components.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Icons.SvgIconType
member.summary: Identifies the SVG icon to render with the component.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Icons.SvgIconType.Folder
member.summary: Folder icon used in the navigation tree.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Icons.SvgIconType.Component
member.summary: Component icon used in the navigation tree.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Icons.SvgIconType.Document
member.summary: Document icon used in the navigation tree.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Icons.SvgIconType.BookmarkHollow
member.summary: Hollow bookmark icon.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Icons.SvgIconType.ExpandAll
member.summary: Expand-all icon.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Icons.SvgIconType.CollapseAll
member.summary: Collapse-all icon.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Icons.SvgIconType.Gear
member.summary: Gear / settings icon.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Icons.SvgIconType.Find
member.summary: Find / search icon.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Icons.SvgIconType.NavigationBack
member.summary: Navigate-back arrow icon.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Icons.SvgIconType.TrashCan
member.summary: Trash can / delete icon.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Icons.SvgIconType.Reload
member.summary: Reload icon for the canvas toolbar.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Icons.SvgIconType.ZoomIn
member.summary: Zoom-in icon for the canvas toolbar.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Icons.SvgIconType.ZoomOut
member.summary: Zoom-out icon for the canvas toolbar.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Icons.SvgIconType.ZoomReset
member.summary: Zoom-reset icon for the canvas toolbar.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Icons.SvgIconType.Background
member.summary: Background toggle icon for the canvas toolbar.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Icons.SvgIconType.Grid
member.summary: Grid overlay icon for the canvas toolbar.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Icons.SvgIconType.ChangeSize
member.summary: Change-size icon for the canvas toolbar.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Icons.SvgIconType.Swap
member.summary: Swap / exchange arrows icon for the canvas toolbar.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Icons.SvgIconType.Measure
member.summary: Measure / ruler icon for the canvas toolbar.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Icons.SvgIconType.Outlines
member.summary: Outlines toggle icon for the canvas toolbar.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Icons.SvgIconType.Reset
member.summary: Reset icon used in the Controls addon.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Icons.SvgIconType.Chevron
member.summary: Chevron (down arrow) icon used in the Controls addon.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Icons.SvgIconType.Exchange
member.summary: Exchange icon used in the Controls addon color input.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Icons.SvgIconType.Close
member.summary: Close (×) icon.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Icons.SvgIconType.CircleClose
member.summary: Circle-close icon.

member.summary: Right side-pane toggle icon.

member.summary: Bottom side-pane toggle icon.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Icons.SvgIconType.OpenNewTab
member.summary: Open-in-new-tab icon.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Icons.SvgIconType.Link
member.summary: Hyperlink icon.

member.summary: Checkmark icon.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Icons.SvgIconType.CircleInfo
member.summary: Circle-info icon used in the settings menu.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Icons.SvgIconType.ReleaseNotes
member.summary: Release-notes icon used in the settings menu.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Icons.SvgIconType.KeyboardShortcuts
member.summary: Keyboard-shortcuts icon used in the settings menu.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Inputs.ColorInput
member.summary: A Blazor component that renders a text input combined with a color picker for CSS color values.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Inputs.ColorInput.Value
member.summary: The current color value as a CSS color string.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Inputs.ColorInput.PlaceHolder
member.summary: The placeholder text displayed in the text input when no value is set.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Inputs.ColorInput.OnInput
member.summary: Callback invoked when the color value changes.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Inputs.ColorInput.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .

member.name: T:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Inputs.NullInputRadio
member.summary: A Blazor component that renders a radio button labeled "null" for selecting a null value.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Inputs.NullInputRadio.Name
member.summary: The radio button group name used to group this radio with others.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Inputs.NullInputRadio.Checked
member.summary: Whether this radio button is currently checked.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Inputs.NullInputRadio.OnChange
member.summary: Callback invoked when this radio button is selected.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Inputs.NumberInput
member.summary: A Blazor component that renders a number input with optional decimal point support and auto-focus.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Inputs.NumberInput.Value
member.summary: The current numeric value as a string.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Inputs.NumberInput.PlaceHolder
member.summary: The placeholder text displayed when no value is entered.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Inputs.NumberInput.Required
member.summary: Whether the input is marked as required.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Inputs.NumberInput.AllowDecimalPoint
member.summary: Whether decimal point entry is allowed; the step value adjusts dynamically to match the input.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Inputs.NumberInput.InitialForcus
member.summary: Whether the input should receive focus automatically when the parameter value changes.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Inputs.NumberInput.OnInput
member.summary: Callback invoked when the input value changes.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Inputs.NumberInput.OnFocus
member.summary: Callback invoked when the input receives focus.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Inputs.RadioGroup
member.summary: A Blazor component that renders a group of radio buttons for selecting one value from a set of items.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Inputs.RadioGroup.Name
member.summary: The radio button group name used to associate all radio buttons in this group.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Inputs.RadioGroup.Value
member.summary: The currently selected value.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Inputs.RadioGroup.Items
member.summary: The collection of items to render as radio buttons.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Inputs.RadioGroup.OnChange
member.summary: Callback invoked when the selected radio button changes.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Inputs.Select
member.summary: A Blazor component that renders a styled drop-down select element for choosing one value from a list.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Inputs.Select.Value
member.summary: The currently selected value.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Inputs.Select.Items
member.summary: The collection of items to populate as select options.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Inputs.Select.OnChange
member.summary: Callback invoked when the selected option changes.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Inputs.TextArea
member.summary: A Blazor component that renders an auto-growing textarea input.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Inputs.TextArea.Value
member.summary: The current text value of the textarea.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Inputs.TextArea.PlaceHolder
member.summary: The placeholder text displayed when the textarea is empty.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Inputs.TextArea.OnInput
member.summary: Callback invoked when the textarea content changes.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.ToolKit.JSInterop.IJSExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for and .

member.name: M:BlazingStory.ToolKit.JSInterop.IJSExtensions.ImportAsync(Microsoft.JSInterop.IJSRuntime,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Import a JavaScript module from the specified path.
member.param: The instance.
The path to the JavaScript module to import, like "./Component.razor.js".
A cache-busting token appended as a query string parameter.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.ToolKit.JSInterop.IJSExtensions.InvokeVoidIfConnectedAsync(Microsoft.JSInterop.IJSObjectReference,System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary:
Invoke a JavaScript function with the specified identifier.
This method will not throw an exception if the is disconnected.
member.param: The instance.
An identifier for the function to invoke.
JSON-serializable arguments.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.ToolKit.JSInterop.IJSExtensions.GetLocalStorageItemAsync(Microsoft.JSInterop.IJSRuntime,System.String)
member.summary: Gets a string value from local storage by key, or null if not found.
member.param: The instance.
The local storage key.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.ToolKit.JSInterop.IJSExtensions.GetLocalStorageItemAsync(Microsoft.JSInterop.IJSRuntime,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets a string value from local storage by key, returning if not found.
member.param: The instance.
The local storage key.
The value to return when the key is absent.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.ToolKit.JSInterop.IJSExtensions.SetLocalStorageItemAsync``1(Microsoft.JSInterop.IJSRuntime,System.String,``0)
member.summary: Stores a value in local storage under the given key.
member.param: The instance.
The local storage key.
The value to store.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.ToolKit.JSInterop.IJSExtensions.SaveObjectToLocalStorageAsync``1(Microsoft.JSInterop.IJSRuntime,System.String,``0)
member.summary: Serializes an object to JSON and saves it in local storage under the given key.
member.param: The instance.
The local storage key.
The object to serialize and store.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.ToolKit.JSInterop.IJSExtensions.LoadObjectFromLocalStorageAsync``1(Microsoft.JSInterop.IJSRuntime,System.String,``0)
member.summary: Loads and deserializes a JSON object from local storage, returning if absent or unparseable.
member.param: The instance.
The local storage key.
The fallback value when the key is absent or deserialization fails.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.ToolKit.JSInterop.IJSExtensions.GetLocalStorageItemAsync``1(Microsoft.JSInterop.IJSRuntime,System.String,``0)
member.summary: Gets a local storage value parsed as , returning if absent or unparseable.
member.param: The instance.
The local storage key.
The fallback value when the key is absent or parsing fails.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.ToolKit.JSInterop.IJSExtensions.DisposeIfConnectedAsync(Microsoft.JSInterop.IJSObjectReference,System.String)
member.summary:
Dispose this object.
If is not null, it will be invoked before disposing the object.
This method will not throw an exception if the is disconnected.
member.param: The instance.
If specified, this method will be invoked before disposing the object.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.ToolKit.JSInterop.IJSExtensions.GetUpdateToken(Microsoft.JSInterop.IJSRuntime,System.String)
member.summary:
Get the query string that ensures the loading of the latest static assets.
This method will return a string like "?v=1.0.0-preview.2.3" if the browser is online. Otherwise, "".
(This method depends on the "Toolbelt.Blazor.getProperty" JavaScript function, which is provided by Toolbelt.Blazor.GetProperty.Script NuGet package)
member.param: The instance to retrieve browser's on-line status
The update token to be included in the query string. This is usually a version number or a timestamp that changes whenever the static assets are updated.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.ToolKit.JSInterop.JSModule
member.summary: A wrapper around a lazily-loaded JavaScript ES module that provides typed invocation helpers.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.ToolKit.JSInterop.JSModule.#ctor(System.Func{Microsoft.JSInterop.IJSRuntime},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .
member.param: A factory that returns the instance.
The path to the JavaScript module file.
A cache-busting token appended as a query string parameter when importing the module.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.ToolKit.JSInterop.JSModule.EnsureModuleAsync
member.summary: Ensures that the required JavaScript module is loaded and ready for use.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.ToolKit.JSInterop.JSModule.InvokeVoidIfConnectedAsync(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Invokes a void JavaScript function on the module without throwing if the JS runtime is disconnected.
member.param: The JavaScript function name to invoke.
JSON-serializable arguments.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.ToolKit.JSInterop.JSModule.InvokeVoidAsync(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Invokes a void JavaScript function on the module, loading the module first if needed.
member.param: The JavaScript function name to invoke.
JSON-serializable arguments.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.ToolKit.JSInterop.JSModule.InvokeAsync``1(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Invokes a JavaScript function on the module and returns the result, loading the module first if needed.
member.param: The JavaScript function name to invoke.
JSON-serializable arguments.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Menus.MenuItem
member.summary: A Blazor component that renders a single clickable menu item.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Menus.MenuItem.OnClick
member.summary: Callback invoked when the menu item is clicked.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Menus.MenuItem.Active
member.summary: Whether the menu item is in an active (selected) state.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Menus.MenuItem.ChildContent
member.summary: The content rendered inside the menu item.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Menus.MenuItemDivider
member.summary: A Blazor component that renders a horizontal divider between menu items.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Menus.PopupMenu
member.summary: A Blazor component that renders a trigger element which opens a popup menu on click.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Menus.PopupMenu.Class
member.summary: Additional CSS class names to apply to the popup menu root element.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Menus.PopupMenu.MarginTop
member.summary: The top margin in pixels applied to the popup panel.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Menus.PopupMenu.Trigger
member.summary: The content rendered as the trigger that opens the popup menu.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Menus.PopupMenu.MenuItems
member.summary: The menu item content rendered inside the popup panel.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Menus.PopupMenu.Services
member.summary: The cascading service provider used to resolve dependencies such as .

member.name: M:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Menus.PopupMenu.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .

member.name: M:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Menus.PopupMenu.ClosePopup
member.summary: Closes the popup menu and unsubscribes from document events.

member.summary: This class contains extension methods for the Razor Components.

member.summary: The class that represents the full name of a namespace.

member.summary: This class contains extension methods for the HTML elements.

member.summary: This class represents an HTML tag.

member.summary: Convert the given string to .
member.param: The string content what is the will render.
member.returns: The that will render the given string content.

member.summary: Convert the given string to .
member.param: The type argument of .
The string content what is the will render.
member.returns: The that will render the given string content.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Utils.HtmlParserToRenderFragment.TryParseAttributeValue(System.String,System.Type,System.Object@)
member.summary: Try to parse the given attribute value to the target type.
member.param: The attribute value to parse.
The target type to parse the attribute value.
The parsed value.
member.returns: If the attribute value is successfully parsed to the target type, returns true. Otherwise, false.

member.summary: Returns whether the given value is a or .

member.name: T:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Utils.TypeUtility
member.summary: Utility class for type inspection and conversion operations.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Utils.TypeUtility.GetTypeDisplayText(System.Type)
member.summary: Returns the display text of the given type as a C# language keyword, including enum values if applicable.
member.param: The type to get the display text for.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Utils.TypeUtility.ExtractTypeStructure(System.Type)
member.summary: Extracts type structure of the given type.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Utils.TypeUtility.GetTypeNameAsLangKeyword(System.Type)
member.summary: Get name of the type as a C# language keyword.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Utils.TypeUtility.TryConvertType(BlazingStory.Abstractions.TypeStructure,System.String,System.Object@)
member.summary:
Try to convert the given string to the given type.
(Most cases, this method uses for deserialize URL query parameters of iframe to component parameters.)
member.param: The structure of the type to convert to.
The string to convert from.
The converted value if the conversion is successful.
member.returns: True if the conversion is successful, otherwise false.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Utils.TypeUtility.TryConvertType(BlazingStory.Abstractions.TypeStructure,System.String,System.Object@,System.IFormatProvider)
member.summary:
Try to convert the given string to the given type.
(Most cases, this method uses for deserialize URL query parameters of iframe to component parameters.)
member.param: The structure of the type to convert to.
The string to convert from.
The converted value if the conversion is successful.
The format provider to use for parsing, if applicable.
member.returns: True if the conversion is successful, otherwise false.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Utils.TypeUtility.IsListCompatibleType(System.Type)
member.summary: Returns whether the given type is or a generic collection interface assignable from , such as , , , , or .

member.name: M:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Utils.TypeUtility.IsParsableType(System.Type)
member.summary: Returns whether the given type implements .

member.name: M:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Utils.TypeUtility.IsNumericType(System.Type)
member.summary: Returns whether the given type is a numeric type.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Utils.TypeUtility.IsDecimalPointType(System.Type)
member.summary: Returns whether the given type is a decimal point type.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Utils.TypeUtility.GetOpenType(System.Type)
member.summary:
Get open type of the given type.
When you pass the `List<T>` type, this method returns `List<>`.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Utils.TypeUtility.IsPlainObjectType(System.Type)
member.summary: Returns whether the given object is a plain object type that should be serialized as a JSON object, like '{"foo":123,"bar:456}}'.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Utils.Unknown
member.summary: Represents an unknown or unresolvable value.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Utils.Unknown.Value
member.summary: The singleton instance representing an unknown value.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Utils.Unknown.ToString
member.summary: Returns a dash ("-") to indicate an unknown value.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Utils.UriParameterKit
member.summary: Utility class for handling URL parameters.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Utils.UriParameterKit.EncodeKeyValues``1(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,``0})
member.summary: Encodes a dictionary of key-value pairs into a semicolon-delimited, URL-escaped string.
member.param: The key-value pairs to encode.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Utils.UriParameterKit.DecodeKeyValues(System.String)
member.summary: Decodes a semicolon-delimited, URL-escaped string into a dictionary of key-value pairs.
member.param: The encoded string to decode.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.ToolKit.Utils.UriParameterKit.GetUri(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Appends the given parameters as a query string to the given URI.
member.param: The base URI.
The query parameters to append.
